name: [GRIDHAND] Seasonal Campaign Agent - Summer: May 1 → seasonal promotion for relevant services

gridhand.scenario: Summer: May 1 → seasonal promotion for relevant services
gridhand.description: When May 1 arrives, a workflow is triggered that automatically updates the online booking system and social media accounts for a local gym, promoting their seasonal summer membership specials and outdoor fitness classes. This workflow, which runs daily for the next two weeks, synchronizes the gym's Google Calendar and Facebook Pages to ensure consistent messaging and scheduling, and also sends a weekly email campaign to existing customers through Mailchimp, highlighting the benefits of their summer programs and encouraging referrals. By streamlining the promotion of their seasonal services, the gym owner can focus on delivering results to their clients while attracting new customers and increasing revenue during the peak summer season.
